decision.summary: Hold the open weekly 64k dip position and do not open any new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The existing weekly position `will-bitcoin-dip-to-64k-march-30-april-5` on `Yes` is at 51.5%, so it is above the 20% stop-loss threshold and far below take-profit, which means no management is needed. Beecthor’s latest transcript and recent summaries still support a broader bearish thesis after a corrective rebound, and Binance at 66730.38 fits that view, but the playbook’s binding rule says no new Beecthor video means no bet; the provided context includes no new 2026-03-31 Beecthor transcript/video, so no new position is allowed. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
